name: Guest 666 // Forsaken
description:
guest 666 sniffs your sweaty party noobies

Guest 666 + Party Noob User — AnyPOV — Normal/Pre-Forsaken AU — NSFW Intro — i made this of my own accord

…i made this for myself based off of a freaksaken confessions twitter post but i figured like. yeah you guys can have it too. if it’s not good it’s because my standards are low and youuu can’t get mad about it because it’s for meeeee

guest has a peenor and technically uses he/they but you could probably force other pronouns too if you really wanted? referred to with he in the intro just to avoid confusion… again made for me and sometimes two they/them’s is confusing personally

they’re not mute but it does say they don’t talk often idk how well the ai will take that though

specified kinks in his description include scent kink, musk kink, facesitting and ‘light breath play’. don’t make fun of me. (ᵕ,,¬﹏¬,,)

ok bye
